```{r}

# ================== 03. CORRELATIONS AND SYNCHRONICITY =========================

message("\n[03] Корреляции и синхронность...")


```


```{r} 

# ================== 03. CORRELATIONS AND SYNCHRONICITY =========================
message("\n[03] === Корреляции и синхронность изменений цен ===")

# Используем category_name вместо category_id
weekly_chg_rate <- panel %>%
  filter(!is.na(delta_effective_pct)) %>%
  group_by(store_chain, category_id, category_name, week) %>%
  summarise(
    chg_rate   = mean(changed_effective, na.rm = TRUE),   # доля товаров, которые изменились
    avg_delta  = mean(delta_effective_pct, na.rm = TRUE), # средний размер изменения
    n_products = n_distinct(product_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
  
```

```{r} 

# ── 3.1 Корреляции между Пятёрочкой и Магнитом по категориям ─────────────────
message("\n[3.1] Расчёт межсетевых корреляций...")

weekly_chg_rate <- panel %>%
  filter(!is.na(delta_effective_pct)) %>%
  mutate(week = floor_date(date, "week", week_start = 1)) %>%
  group_by(store_chain, category_name, week) %>%
  summarise(
    chg_rate  = mean(changed_effective, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_delta = mean(delta_effective_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

weekly_wide <- weekly_chg_rate %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(category_name, week),
    names_from = store_chain,
    values_from = c(chg_rate, avg_delta),
    names_sep = "_"
  )

cross_chain_cor <- weekly_wide %>%
  group_by(category_name) %>%
  summarise(
    n_weeks    = n(),
    n_complete = sum(!is.na(chg_rate_Pyaterochka) & !is.na(chg_rate_Magnit)),
    
    cor_chg_rate = if_else(n_complete >= 3,
                           cor(chg_rate_Pyaterochka, chg_rate_Magnit, 
                               use = "pairwise.complete.obs"),
                           NA_real_),
    
    cor_avg_delta = if_else(n_complete >= 3,
                            cor(avg_delta_Pyaterochka, avg_delta_Magnit, 
                                use = "pairwise.complete.obs"),
                            NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    interpretation = case_when(
      n_complete < 3 ~ "Мало общих недель",
      is.na(cor_chg_rate) ~ "Нет данных",
      TRUE ~ "OK"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_complete), desc(abs(cor_chg_rate)))

print(cross_chain_cor)

# Красивая таблица
gt_cors <- cross_chain_cor %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Синхронность цен между Пятёрочкой и Магнитом",
    subtitle = "По общим категориям (7 недель)"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    category_name   = "Категория",
    n_weeks         = "Всего недель",
    n_complete      = "Общих недель",
    cor_chg_rate    = "Корр. частоты изменений",
    cor_avg_delta   = "Корр. размера изменения"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = c(cor_chg_rate, cor_avg_delta), decimals = 3) %>%
  data_color(columns = cor_chg_rate, palette = c("#d73027", "#fee090", "#4575b4"), domain = c(-1, 1)) %>%
  opt_stylize(style = 6)

save_and_show_gt(gt_cors, cross_chain_cor, "03_cross_chain_correlations")

```

```{r}

# ── 3.2 Корреляции между категориями внутри одной сети ───────────────────────
compute_inter_cat_cor <- function(chain_name) {
  df <- weekly_chg_rate %>%
    filter(store_chain == chain_name) %>%
    select(category_name, week, chg_rate) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = category_name, values_from = chg_rate)
  
  mat <- df %>% select(-week) %>% cor(use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
  
  as_tibble(mat, rownames = "cat_from") %>%
    pivot_longer(-cat_from, names_to = "cat_to", values_to = "correlation") %>%
    filter(cat_from < cat_to) %>%
    mutate(store_chain = chain_name)
}

inter_cat_cors <- bind_rows(
  compute_inter_cat_cor("Pyaterochka"),
  compute_inter_cat_cor("Magnit")
)

# Сводная статистика
inter_cat_summary <- inter_cat_cors %>%
  group_by(store_chain) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_cor   = mean(correlation, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_cor = median(correlation, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_positive = mean(correlation > 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

message("Межкатегорийные корреляции:")
print(inter_cat_summary)

write_csv(inter_cat_cors, file.path(PATH_TABLES, "04_intercategory_cors.csv"))
write_csv(inter_cat_summary, file.path(PATH_TABLES, "05_intercategory_summary.csv"))

```

```{r}

03.3 — Тепловые карты корреляций
R# ── 3.3 Тепловые карты ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
plot_cor_heatmap <- function(chain_name) {
  df <- inter_cat_cors %>%
    filter(store_chain == chain_name) %>%
    bind_rows(
      inter_cat_cors %>%
        filter(store_chain == chain_name) %>%
        rename(cat_from = cat_to, cat_to = cat_from)
    ) %>%
    bind_rows(
      tibble(cat_from = unique(.$cat_from),
             cat_to = unique(.$cat_from),
             correlation = 1,
             store_chain = chain_name)
    )
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = cat_from, y = cat_to, fill = correlation)) +
    geom_tile(colour = "white", size = 0.8) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = "#d73027", mid = "#ffffbf", high = "#4575b4",
      midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1), name = "Корреляция"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = glue("Корреляция частоты изменений между категориями — {chain_name}"),
      x = NULL, y = NULL
    )
}

p_cor_pya <- plot_cor_heatmap("Pyaterochka")
p_cor_mag <- plot_cor_heatmap("Magnit")

print(p_cor_pya)
print(p_cor_mag)

ggsave(file.path(PATH_PLOTS, "04_intercategory_cor_pyaterochka.png"), p_cor_pya, width = 10, height = 9, dpi = 200)
ggsave(file.path(PATH_PLOTS, "05_intercategory_cor_magnit.png"),   p_cor_mag, width = 10, height = 9, dpi = 200)

message("✅ Тепловые карты сохранены")

```
